name: Main Engine (generic)
description: Starter recurring service template for a main propulsion engine.

tasks.title: Change engine oil and primary filters
tasks.description: Replace engine oil and primary oil filters, then verify pressure after warmup.

tasks.title: Inspect and service fuel filter set
tasks.description: Inspect Racor bowls, replace secondaries if loaded, and log any contamination.

tasks.title: Inspect raw water impeller and cooling flow
tasks.description: Check impeller condition, pump housing, and discharge temperature/flow.

tasks.title: Inspect belts, hoses, and engine mounts
tasks.description: Inspect belt wear, hose condition, and mount fasteners for movement or vibration.

name: Generator (generic)
description: Starter recurring service template for vessel generators.

tasks.title: Change generator oil and filter
tasks.description: Perform generator oil service and record load hours at completion.

tasks.title: Inspect raw water impeller and exhaust discharge
tasks.description: Verify raw-water flow and inspect the wet exhaust path for heat or leaks.

tasks.title: Inspect drive belt and electrical terminations
tasks.description: Check tension, belt wear, battery charging, and terminal cleanliness.

name: AC / Chiller System
description: Recurring checks for chilled water and onboard HVAC systems.

tasks.title: Clean seawater strainers and verify pump operation
tasks.description: Clean intake strainers, verify seawater pump flow, and confirm discharge temperature.

tasks.title: Inspect air handlers and chilled-water flow
tasks.description: Verify handler drains, blower response, and balanced chilled-water flow.

tasks.title: Check refrigerant pressures with technician
tasks.description: Coordinate seasonal pressure and condenser efficiency check with qualified HVAC support.

name: Bilge / Pump System
description: Recurring bilge and pump integrity checks.

tasks.title: Test bilge pumps and float switches
tasks.description: Cycle auto and manual pump modes and confirm float switch response.

tasks.title: Clean bilges and inspect for contamination
tasks.description: Check for oil sheen, debris, and stagnant water around pumps and limber holes.

tasks.title: Inspect discharge hoses and clamps
tasks.description: Inspect hose routing, check valves, and clamp integrity at each pump outlet.

name: Fresh Water System
description: Recurring potable water system service items.

tasks.title: Check water pump pressure and inspect for leaks
tasks.description: Verify pressure stability at fixtures and inspect pump cycling behavior.

tasks.title: Sanitize fresh water tanks and lines
tasks.description: Flush and sanitize potable water tanks, manifolds, and outlet points.

tasks.title: Inspect water filters and UV treatment
tasks.description: Replace inline filters as needed and confirm UV or treatment hardware is operating.

name: Heads / Sanitation System
description: Recurring service items for marine heads, macerators, and sanitation piping.

tasks.title: Cycle heads and verify discharge / flush operation
tasks.description: Test each head for proper flush sequence, discharge, and venting.

tasks.title: Inspect sanitation hoses, clamps, and vent filters
tasks.description: Check for seepage, odor, clamp corrosion, and blocked vent components.

tasks.title: Service treatment / holding tank fittings
tasks.description: Inspect tank fittings, macerator connections, Y-valves, and treatment dosing components.

name: Exterior Washdown / General Deck
description: Recurring deck, exterior, and presentation maintenance.

tasks.title: Exterior washdown and stainless rinse
tasks.description: Wash salt from topsides, rails, hardware, and cockpit fittings.

tasks.title: Inspect scuppers, deck drains, and anchor locker drains
tasks.description: Clear debris from drains and verify runoff paths are not backing up.

tasks.title: Inspect deck hardware, hatches, and fasteners
tasks.description: Check hatch dogs, deck cleats, rails, and visible fasteners for looseness or corrosion.

name: Safety Equipment
description: Recurring checks for emergency and compliance equipment.

tasks.title: Inspect fire extinguishers and pressure indicators
tasks.description: Inspect extinguisher seals, gauges, and mounting points in all stations.

tasks.title: Check EPIRB, flares, and ditch-bag expiration dates
tasks.description: Verify emergency beacon readiness and inspect dated pyrotechnics and batteries.

tasks.title: Inspect PFDs, throwables, and liferaft service status
tasks.description: Confirm gear condition, count, accessibility, and scheduled raft service windows.
